title: cleidion vieillardii
intro: Cleidion vieillardii, also known as Vieillard's cleidion, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to New Caledonia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cleidion vieillardii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Cleidion vieillardii is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its herbal uses.
